name: Tube
description: Glossy cylinders lined up like pipes, turning upright or flat on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); --tone: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 8% 22%; border-radius: 30%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.36), @var(--tone) 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 50%, @var(--tone) 70%, rgba(0,0,0,0.36)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
